summary: The session focused on creating Entity-Relationship Diagrams (ERDs) for both the hospital data model and the pharmaceutical industry, with a request for a detailed framework for marketing automation in the healthcare industry. The user requested multiple formats for the diagrams due to visibility issues with images.
facts: The user requested an ERD diagram for the hospital data model.
The user requested an ERD diagram for the pharmaceutical industry.
The user was unable to see the image of the pharmaceutical industry ERD diagram.
The user requested a detailed text representation of the ERD diagram for the pharmaceutical industry.
The user requested to adapt the pharmaceutical data model for marketing automation in the healthcare industry.
The user asked for the ERD diagrams to be presented in a format they could see clearly.
